infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We use your location to show nearby routes and help you navigate safely.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeNight needs background location access to keep navigating and sharing your location with your Safety Circle even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: SafeNight needs background location access to continue navigation and live location sharing.

web.name: SafeNight — Walk Safer at Night
web.description: AI-powered safe walking route finder. Get real-time safety scores, street lighting data, crime stats, and live navigation to walk home safer at night.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SafeNight needs background location access to keep navigating and sharing your location with your Safety Circle even when the app is in the background.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: SafeNight needs background location access to continue navigation and live location sharing.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: We use your location to show nearby routes and help you navigate safely.
